root_cause.evidence: The detached watcher pane recorded ten SyntaxError failures at 'from __future__ import annotations'. Its /usr/bin/env python3 shebang resolved to Python 3.6.15, while the classifier requires Python 3.7 or newer.
root_cause.effect: The watcher emitted a fail-closed MONITOR_ERROR after ten unreliable observations and resumed the orchestrator once; no G2 task was retried, cancelled, or modified.

changes: Invoke the classifier and every watcher JSON helper through an absolute Python 3.11 path.
Compile-check the classifier during preflight and require squeue/sacct availability.
Use a new one-shot run ID and marker namespace; preserve the original event and markers.
repair.tests: 10/10 unittest cases PASS plus Python 3.11 py_compile and watcher preflight PASS

worker_uuid_policy: All registered role UUIDs preserved; no provider dispatch or conversation replacement.
reset_credit_policy: One personal Codex Full reset expiring 2026-08-12 remains available and protected; none consumed.
